_comment5: Blocks in this tag are ALWAYS rejected as texture sources,
_comment6: even if they pass property checks. Takes priority over the whitelist.
_comment10: - Add tag references with required:false (see IMPORTANT note below):
_comment13: IMPORTANT: Tag references (#) from other mods MUST use required:false
_comment14: or the entire file will fail to load if that mod is not installed.
_comment15: Vanilla tags (e.g. #minecraft:stairs) can be added as plain strings.
